query: Florida 2026 gubernatorial GOP primary debate schedule Byron Donalds James Fishback David Jolly - any debates scheduled or held summer 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on the Florida 2026 GOP gubernatorial primary debate situation:

**Debates held (summer 2026):** Yes — a GOP undercard debate called "The Future of Florida" was held around late June/early July 2026, hosted by podcaster Patrick Bet-David and streamed on YouTube (no network would air it). It featured Jay Collins, James Fishback, and Paul Renner. The trio had also debated on a podcast the week prior.

**Byron Donalds:** The Trump-endorsed front-runner (~51% polling, ~$90M raised) **refused to debate** all rivals, citing their single-digit polling and "no participation trophies." No Donalds-inclusive primary debate is held or scheduled.

**October general-election debate:** "Decision 2026: Before YOU Vote" announced a gubernatorial debate for Oct. 15, 2026 at FAU (Boca Raton), but the Republican Party of Florida says it has **not sanctioned** any debate, and Democrat David Jolly called it "premature"/unconfirmed.

**Important clarification:** David Jolly is the **Democratic** presumptive nominee — not a GOP primary candidate — so he wouldn't appear in any GOP primary debate.

The primary is August 18, 2026.

sources.title: If Florida's GOP debate for governor has no Byron Donalds, does it count?
sources.snippet: Undercard GOP debate 'The Future of Florida' hosted by Patrick Bet-David; Collins, Fishback, Renner participated; Donalds skipped.

sources.title: Byron Donalds says GOP opponents can't win statewide, so he won't debate them
sources.snippet: Donalds standing by decision not to debate Collins, Fishback, Renner; polling and fundraising details.

sources.title: Republican Party of Florida Says Debates Haven't Been Set for Senate, Gubernatorial Races
sources.snippet: RPOF says it has not sanctioned any debates; Oct. 15 gubernatorial debate at FAU announced by Decision 2026 but unconfirmed; Jolly calls it premature.

sources.title: David Jolly, Evan Power say debate announcement is premature
sources.snippet: Democratic front-runner Jolly and GOP chair Power both say the October debate announcement was premature.

sources.title: 2026 Florida gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Election Nov 3, 2026; primaries Aug 18, 2026; DeSantis term-limited.
